result: The partnership/marital status data has been harmonised across waves (Age 19, 25, and 32). Collapsed variables (`partnr19`, `partnr25`, `partnr32`) were created for cross-wave comparability, and detailed adult versions (`partnradu25`, `partnradu32`) were retained for waves with more granular categories. Missing values were standardised according to the provided scheme (-9 for refusal, -8 for don't know, etc.), and the final dataset was saved to `data/output/cleaned_data.csv`.
